problems.title: COMMUTER RUSH HOUR
problems.description: Over 500,000 daily commuters arrive at Lagos & Abuja terminals during peak morning rush (06:00–08:30).

problems.title: MANUAL FARE LEAKAGE
problems.description: Paper ticketing & un-audited cash collection cause up to 25% revenue loss across municipal BRT corridors.

problems.title: UNPREDICTABLE QUEUE DELAYS
problems.description: Commuters suffer 45+ min queue delays due to uncoordinated bus dispatches at Ikeja, Oshodi & Nyanya.

problems.title: UNTRACKED FLEET BREAKDOWNS
problems.description: Lack of real-time GPS sensors & engine diagnostics leads to sudden bus overheating and stranded commuters.

problems.title: ISOLATED DATA SILOS
problems.description: Transport authorities manage operations using static Excel sheets with zero real-time BI synchronization.

problems.title: DIXNOVA DATA INTELLIGENCE
problems.description: Unified Microsoft Power BI Fabric data lake & live telematics command center solving all transit bottlenecks.
